behaviors.behavior: AC1/multi: SessionStart hook emits exactly one phase_started on a fresh claim (phase + runId + ts)
AC1/multi: idempotent SessionStart re-entry (reconnect) does NOT double-emit
AC1/multi: a blocked SessionStart (wrong skill) never claims, so emits no phase_started
AC2/multi: phase_started pairs with the existing phase_completed for the same phase
Shared emitter never raises on a subprocess spawn failure (best-effort contract)
Shared emitter decodes child output utf-8/replace (Windows cp1252 landmine)
AC1/single: single-session-next emits one phase_started with runId in detail
AC1/single: idempotent re-dispatch (crash-resume) does NOT double-emit
Run-plugin emitters never raise on a subprocess spawn failure
AC2/single: single-session-apply emits paired phase_completed (same runId/phase, start.ts <= end.ts)
AC2/single: an ok=False result emits phase_failed (mirror of phase_session_stop), not phase_completed
AC2/single: a full pipeline walk yields exactly one phase_started per phase
AC3: no event-schema regression; existing consumers (compliance change_history collector + freshness verifiers) tolerate phase_started/phase_completed
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_record_event.py + test_infrastructure_checks.py + test_verifiers_runtime.py + test_events_log_ssot.py PASSED (108 shared affected green)

behaviors.behavior: AC4: footprint stays within the emit sites; bloat baseline not ratcheted
